description: Investigate OpenICE's data communication architecture and assess feasibility for EHR integration. Generate active data by creating at least two distinct simulated device adapters (e.g., Multiparameter Monitor, Pulse Oximeter) in the OpenICE Supervisor and confirming data flow through the Vital Signs clinical application. Analyze the runtime logs at /home/ga/openice/logs/openice.log and source code at /opt/openice/mdpnp/ to identify DDS middleware topics, ICE data models, and integration points. Document your findings in a technically accurate feasibility report saved to /home/ga/Desktop/ehr_integration_report.txt, including four sections: 'Device Data Inventory', 'Data Architecture', 'Integration Recommendations', and 'Observed Data Characteristics'.
